query:
INSERT INTO products (
            id, slug, kind, name, tagline, description, price_cents,
            highlights, deliverables, requirements, media_poster_color,
            media_accent, specs_json
        ) VALUES (
            $1, $2, 'course', 'PR12 Course', 'tag', 'desc', 19900,
            '{}', '{}', '{}', '#000', '#fff', $3
        )
